languages.text: "Льды... наступали... на мавзолей... стихия... одержала... верх... века... минули... расхитители... обнаружили... меня". {n}Перевод сервитора-толкователя прерывается внезапными паузами. Похоже, машинному духу чрезвычайно тяжело интерпретировать лязгающие и воющие звуки, служащие ксеносу речью.{/n}

"Ice... was encroaching on the mausoleum... nature... won... out... centuries... passed... plunderers... found... me." {n}The Elucidator servitor's translation is punctuated by abrupt pauses. The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Льды... наступали... на мавзолей... стихия... одержала... верх... века... минули... расхитители... обнаружили... меня". {n}Перевод сервитора-толкователя прерывается внезапными паузами. Похоже, машинному духу чрезвычайно тяжело интерпретировать лязгающие и воющие звуки, служащие ксеносу речью.{/n}

The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}

languages.text: “寒冰……侵蚀……陵墓……自然……胜出……世纪……流逝……劫掠者……发现了……我。”{n}阐释器机仆的转译被突兀的停顿切断。它的机魂似乎正极其艰难地解析构成异形语言的撞击与尖啸声。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ice... was encroaching on the mausoleum... nature... won... out... centuries... passed... plunderers... found... me." {n}The Elucidator servitor's translation is punctuated by abrupt pauses. The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “寒冰……侵蚀……陵墓……自然……胜出……世纪……流逝……劫掠者……发现了……我。”{n}阐释器机仆的转译被突兀的停顿切断。它的机魂似乎正极其艰难地解析构成异形语言的撞击与尖啸声。{/n}

languages.text: «El hielo... invadía el mausoleo... la naturaleza... ganó... siglos... más tarde... saqueadores... me... encontraron». {n}La traducción del dilucidador se interrumpe constantemente. Parece que los ruidos y aullidos metálicos del xenos son demasiado complejos para el espíritu máquina.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ice... was encroaching on the mausoleum... nature... won... out... centuries... passed... plunderers... found... me." {n}The Elucidator servitor's translation is punctuated by abrupt pauses. The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «El hielo... invadía el mausoleo... la naturaleza... ganó... siglos... más tarde... saqueadores... me... encontraron». {n}La traducción del dilucidador se interrumpe constantemente. Parece que los ruidos y aullidos metálicos del xenos son demasiado complejos para el espíritu máquina.{/n}

languages.text: « La glace... se répandait... dans le mausolée... La nature... avait... gagné... Des siècles... écoulés... Des pillards... m'ont... trouvé. » {n}La traduction du servitor élucidateur est émaillée de pauses abruptes. L'esprit de la machine semble avoir la plus grande difficulté à interpréter les cliquetis et les hurlements par lesquels le xénos s'exprime.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ice... was encroaching on the mausoleum... nature... won... out... centuries... passed... plunderers... found... me." {n}The Elucidator servitor's translation is punctuated by abrupt pauses. The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « La glace... se répandait... dans le mausolée... La nature... avait... gagné... Des siècles... écoulés... Des pillards... m'ont... trouvé. » {n}La traduction du servitor élucidateur est émaillée de pauses abruptes. L'esprit de la machine semble avoir la plus grande difficulté à interpréter les cliquetis et les hurlements par lesquels le xénos s'exprime.{/n}

languages.text: "Buz... Anıt mezarı... İstila ediyordu... Doğa... Galip geldi... Yüzyıllar... Geçti... Yağmacılar... Beni... Buldu." {n}Aydınlatıcı hizmetörün çevirisi, ani duraklamalarla bölünüyor. Makine ruhu, zenonun takırtılı ve uluyan seslerden oluşan konuşmasını yorumlamakta son derece zorlanıyor gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ice... was encroaching on the mausoleum... nature... won... out... centuries... passed... plunderers... found... me." {n}The Elucidator servitor's translation is punctuated by abrupt pauses. The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Buz... Anıt mezarı... İstila ediyordu... Doğa... Galip geldi... Yüzyıllar... Geçti... Yağmacılar... Beni... Buldu." {n}Aydınlatıcı hizmetörün çevirisi, ani duraklamalarla bölünüyor. Makine ruhu, zenonun takırtılı ve uluyan seslerden oluşan konuşmasını yorumlamakta son derece zorlanıyor gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Eis ... bedeckte das Mausoleum ... Natur ... siegte ... Jahrhunderte ... vergingen ... Plünderer ... fanden ... mich." {n}Die Übersetzung des Elucidator-Servitors ist mit Pausen durchsetzt. Der Maschinengeist scheint große Schwierigkeiten zu haben, die klopfenden und heulenden Geräusche zu interpretieren, mit denen der Xenos spricht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ice... was encroaching on the mausoleum... nature... won... out... centuries... passed... plunderers... found... me." {n}The Elucidator servitor's translation is punctuated by abrupt pauses. The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Eis ... bedeckte das Mausoleum ... Natur ... siegte ... Jahrhunderte ... vergingen ... Plünderer ... fanden ... mich." {n}Die Übersetzung des Elucidator-Servitors ist mit Pausen durchsetzt. Der Maschinengeist scheint große Schwierigkeiten zu haben, die klopfenden und heulenden Geräusche zu interpretieren, mit denen der Xenos spricht.{/n}

languages.text: 「氷…は…陵墓を…侵食…していた…自然…が…勝った…何世紀も…経った…略奪者…が…私を…見つけた」{n}エリュシデーターのサービトの翻訳は、不意な間断で語られる。機械霊は、異星人の言語として機能する金属音と唸り声を解釈するのに苦戦しているようである。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ice... was encroaching on the mausoleum... nature... won... out... centuries... passed... plunderers... found... me." {n}The Elucidator servitor's translation is punctuated by abrupt pauses. The machine spirit seems to be interpreting the clanking and howling sounds that serve as the xenos's speech with extreme difficulty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「氷…は…陵墓を…侵食…していた…自然…が…勝った…何世紀も…経った…略奪者…が…私を…見つけた」{n}エリュシデーターのサービトの翻訳は、不意な間断で語られる。機械霊は、異星人の言語として機能する金属音と唸り声を解釈するのに苦戦しているようである。{/n}
